name: List recent todos
prompt: Look through all recent meeting transcripts and extract every action item, todo, or task that was assigned. List them with the assignee and the meeting they came from.

name: Coach me
prompt: Analyze how I showed up in this meeting. Did I speak too much or too little? Did I ask open-ended questions? Was I a good listener? Give me specific, actionable coaching feedback.

name: Write weekly recap
prompt: Generate a weekly recap summarizing all meetings from the past 7 days. Include key decisions, action items, and notable discussions organized by topic.

name: Streamline my calendar
prompt: Analyze my recent meetings and suggest which ones could be emails, which ones need fewer attendees, and how I could optimize my meeting schedule.

name: Blind spots
prompt: Based on my recent meetings, identify things I might be missing — topics that were raised but not resolved, people who seemed disengaged, or decisions that lacked key input.
